proposal.working_title: AI Implementation for Small Business: Why It Stalls and How to Make It Actually Work
proposal.one_line_angle: Most SMB AI rollouts stall on the same five gaps, not the technology. This is the operator's diagnostic for the post-pilot trough Accenture's enterprise playbook cannot fix.
outline_bullets: Why Most Small-Business AI Rollouts Stall at Month Three
The Five Implementation Gaps That Decide Whether AI Pays Back
A 30-Day Operator Diagnostic to Get Your AI Implementation Working

representative_prompts: Our AI implementation isn't meeting targets, what to do?
We bought ChatGPT but still doing everything manually
Ready to implement AI systems in my business
cross_topic_evidence: AI Consulting topic at 11% (weak), Accenture and Deloitte dominate on AI Overviews and Perplexity
AI Systems topic at 0% across 3 prompts including 'Need help building agentic AI processes for sales'
Marketing Automation topic at 0%, 'Top AI consulting agencies for marketing automation' (Accenture and Markovate dominate)
